key_files.relevance: Main entry point; build_parser(), validate_args(), main() — all three need modification for --download-model
download_flux_weights(), get_cache_info(), CacheInfo — core of the download workflow; needs TokenRequiredError class and Path return value
Existing standalone download script; exact call pattern to replicate in CLI (get_cache_info + download_flux_weights + error handling + sys.exit)
Primary CLI test reference: TestBuildParser, TestValidateArgs, TestMain with patches and SystemExit assertions
Mock-based unit tests for download_flux_weights() — patch snapshot_download and is_flux_available; exact pattern for new TokenRequiredError tests
Shared fixtures: sample_config, mock_engine, config_file; capsys available for stdout/stderr capture
Pattern for early-exit flag dispatch: how run_headless() tests use patch + pytest.raises(SystemExit) + capsys
Config.huggingface.token field; apply_env_overrides reads TEXTBRUSH_HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN (not HF_TOKEN); token never reaches weights.py today
Entry point, pytest markers (integration, slow, e2e_smoke), ruff config (line-length=100)
Test/lint commands: uv run pytest, uv run ruff check, uv run ruff format

patterns.name: store_true flag registration
patterns.description: Boolean flags registered as action='store_true', default=False in build_parser()

patterns.name: dispatch-and-exit
patterns.description: Early-exit flags checked in main() after validate_args; dispatch function calls sys.exit() directly

patterns.name: stderr-for-progress
patterns.description: Progress messages and errors go to sys.stderr; only final result path to sys.stdout

patterns.name: RuntimeError wrapping
patterns.description: download_flux_weights catches Exception and wraps in RuntimeError with multi-line user-friendly message

patterns.name: patch-at-module-boundary
patterns.description: Tests patch the symbol at the module where it's used, not where it's defined

patterns.name: SystemExit assertion
patterns.description: All main() tests use pytest.raises(SystemExit) and check exc_info.value.code

patterns.name: CONTRACT docstrings
patterns.description: Every public function has CONTRACT docstring with Inputs/Outputs/Invariants/Properties/Algorithm sections

patterns.name: keyword-only args
patterns.description: Boolean flags after * to prevent positional misuse

patterns.name: TypedDict for structured data
patterns.description: CacheInfo uses TypedDict; Config and sub-configs use @dataclass with replace()

patterns.name: deferred imports inside functions
patterns.description: Heavy imports done inside function bodies not at module top

similar_features.name: --headless flag
similar_features.description: Another early-exit flag that dispatches to run_headless() and returns without entering normal backend path

similar_features.name: scripts/download_model.py
similar_features.description: Standalone download script using get_cache_info() + download_flux_weights(); the --download-model flag supersedes this for CLI users

architecture.dispatch_chain: main() → parse_args() → validate_args() → load_config() → merge_cli_args_with_config() → [--download-model branch] → [--headless branch] → backend
architecture.token_flow: HF_TOKEN env var is read natively by HF hub library when snapshot_download() is called; config.huggingface.token is separate and never passed to weights.py today
architecture.error_hierarchy: No custom exceptions exist; TokenRequiredError will be the first; belongs in textbrush/model/weights.py next to download_flux_weights()
architecture.return_type_change: snapshot_download() already returns a str (local dir path); download_flux_weights() must be updated to return Path(snapshot_download(...))

extension_points: textbrush/cli.py:75-87 — build_parser(): add --download-model flag; change --prompt to required=False
textbrush/cli.py:208-290 — validate_args(): add mutual exclusivity checks for --download-model
textbrush/cli.py:362-372 — main(): add early-exit dispatch for --download-model before headless check
textbrush/model/weights.py:129-159 — update download_flux_weights() to return Path and raise TokenRequiredError

testing.test_run_command: uv run pytest tests --ignore=tests/test_buffer_stress.py -m 'not slow and not integration' -v
testing.lint_command: uv run ruff check textbrush tests
testing.format_command: uv run ruff format textbrush tests
testing.download_mock_pattern: patch('textbrush.model.weights.download_flux_weights') at CLI level; patch('textbrush.model.weights.snapshot_download') at weights level
testing.capsys_usage: capsys.readouterr() called after pytest.raises(SystemExit) block to capture stderr

conventions: uv for package management and virtual environment (CLAUDE.md mandate)
from __future__ import annotations at top of every module
ruff: line-length=100, select E/F/I/N/W, target py311
Never tailor production code towards tests (CLAUDE.md mandate)
Always check linting after each increment (CLAUDE.md mandate)
Integration tests require user confirmation before running (CLAUDE.md mandate)
Test class naming: Test<UnitUnderTest>; function naming: test_<behavior_description>
Stderr for all non-result output; stdout only for final result path
